## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX, focusing on content quality, processes, and AI integration.](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role requires innate understanding of content quality + strong process/workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Saj demonstrated experience in content strategy, AI integration, and cross-functional collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Matthew emphasized importance of articulating processes, interfacing with engineering, and high agency in problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Saj showcased hands-on experience with AI tools, including creating custom GPTs and multimedia content](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

## Topics

### Role Requirements and Context

  - [Position combines content expertise with process management](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Involves creating/maintaining workflows and pipelines, often AI-assisted](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Requires ability to articulate processes clearly, especially to engineering teams](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Need for high agency in problem-solving and prototyping solutions](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

### Saj's Relevant Experience

  - [10 years in content marketing, background in journalism (BBC)](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Developed content strategies and workflows at Publicis Sapient](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Created AI-focused content engine playbook](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Implemented content governance models and topic opportunity reports at Terakit](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Managed technical writers and interfaced with engineering teams](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

### Content Quality Evaluation

  - [Saj uses comprehensive checklists for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Focuses on addressing skill gaps in teams](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Created training materials (e.g., "Stats the Musical") for writers](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Emphasizes authoritative sources, originality, and appropriate length/format](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Considers multimedia applications and audience-specific content (e.g., Gen Z)](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### AI and Automation Tools Experience

  - [Created custom GPTs (e.g., CaseMind for law firm, email marketing GPT)](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Utilizes various AI tools: Perplexity, ChatGPT, Canva, Gemini, Runway](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Developed AI-generated content for personal venture (Simple Content)](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Basic understanding of APIs and Python](https://fathom.video/share/Qhjs8Cw82rj6nva6pto3dsCHGE9nvm7C?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Next Steps

  - Further evaluation of Saj's assignment submission
  - Potential follow-up discussion on specific aspects of the role or Saj's experience
  - Consider Saj's fit within the team's need for high-agency problem solvers
